name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic wood-fired pizza with tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and basil.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Wood-fired pizza topped with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and spicy pepperoni.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce, parmesan, croutons, and creamy Caesar dressing.

name: Greek Salad
description: Tomato, cucumber, red onion, olives, and feta cheese with olive oil dressing.

name: Vanilla Ice Cream
description: Two scoops of classic vanilla bean ice cream.

name: Chocolate Ice Cream
description: Two scoops of rich Belgian chocolate ice cream.

name: Espresso
description: Double shot of freshly ground Italian espresso.

name: Latte
description: Espresso with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.
